comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *baude* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [baude] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

How about (untested):

```yaml
diff --git a/.cirrus.yml b/.cirrus.yml
index abf3d0dd8..b97a7f471 100644
--- a/.cirrus.yml
+++ b/.cirrus.yml
@@ -671,13 +671,20 @@ test_docs_task:
           #- "test_docs"
           #- "varlink_api"
           #- "build_each_commit"
+        - "make swagger"
     stub_script: '/bin/true'
 
 
-#publish_docs_task:
-#
-#    only_if: $CIRRUS_BRANCH == $DEST_BRANCH &&
-#             $CIRRUS_TAG =~ '^v[0-9]\.[0-9]\.[0-9]$'
+publish_docs_task:
+
+    only_if: >-
+        $CIRRUS_BRANCH != $DEST_BRANCH &&
+        $CIRRUS_CHANGE_MESSAGE =~ '.*CI:DOCS.*'
+
+    depends_on:
+        - "test_docs"
+
+    script: "$SCRIPT_BASE/upload_release_archive.sh |& ${TIMESTAMP}"
 
 
 # Post message to IRC if everything passed PR testing
@@ -707,6 +714,7 @@ success_task:
         - "upload_snap"
         - "verify_test_built_images"
         - "test_docs"
+        - "publish_docs_task"
 
     env:
         CIRRUS_WORKING_DIR: "/usr/src/libpod"
```

let's try:

```yaml
test_docs_task:

    only_if: >-
        $CIRRUS_BRANCH != $DEST_BRANCH &&
        $CIRRUS_CHANGE_MESSAGE =~ '.*CI:DOCS.*'
    depends_on:
        - "gating"
        - "vendor"
          #- "test_docs"
          #- "varlink_api"
          #- "build_each_commit"
        - "SCRIPT_BASE/build_swagger.sh |& ${TIMESTAMP}"
    stub_script: '/bin/true'


publish_docs_task:

    only_if: >-
        $CIRRUS_BRANCH != $DEST_BRANCH &&
        $CIRRUS_CHANGE_MESSAGE =~ '.*CI:DOCS.*'

    depends_on:
        - "test_docs"

    script:
        - "SCRIPT_BASE/build_swagger.sh |& ${TIMESTAMP}"
        - "$SCRIPT_BASE/upload_release_archive.sh |& ${TIMESTAMP}"
```
@baude there were too many things that would break, so I branched what you did already as:  https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4895
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #4895) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

@baude: PR needs rebase.

<details>

Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
